compiled_state.title: brainstorm(w21-bsnz): agent contracts undefined -> implementation agents invent incompatible interfaces
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Epic w21-bsnz (remediate legacy code) completed brainstorm without defining the input/output payload schemas for the two new agents:

1. dso:bloat-blue-team — SC4 specifies three output verdicts (CONFIRM/DISMISS/NEEDS_HUMAN) but not the input payload shape ({candidates: [{pattern_id, file, line_range, excerpt, engine, confidence}]}) or the output structure ({verdicts: [{candidate_id, verdict, rationale}]}). The fidelity reviewer flagged this (finding F2) and suggested a contract file at plugins/dso/docs/contracts/bloat-blue-team-payload.md.

2. dso:bloat-resolver — SC5 describes the resolution behavior but not the input format the resolver receives or the NO_CHANGE output structure.

Impact: Two independent implementers (skill author + agent author) would invent incompatible interfaces. These contracts should be defined before preplanning decomposes the epic into stories.

Resolution: Define both agent payload contracts and add them to the epic description or as contract files before /dso:preplanning runs.
